title: Restore rich detail panel content in bead detail popup
description:
The DetailPopup modal introduced in the TUI layout spec uses format_detail_panel() rendered into a Static widget — a plain text fallback that loses all the rich formatting of the wide-layout detail panel: no Collapsible sections, no coloured headings, no section separators, no summary header, and no telemetry data.

Fix: rewrite DetailPopup.compose() to use the same widget structure as the wide-layout #detail-panel in app.py:
- A Static for the summary header (same content as _detail_summary_lines(), which includes the telemetry badge via _telemetry_badge())
- A Collapsible per section in DETAIL_SECTION_ORDER, each containing a Static updated via _detail_section_body(); the telemetry section must be included
- Pass subtree_telemetry (obtained via runtime_state.subtree_telemetry_for(bead.bead_id)) to both the summary header and the section body helpers so telemetry data renders correctly
- All inside a VerticalScroll so the popup remains scrollable

Collapsibles should default to expanded (collapsed=False) in the popup so all content is visible on open. The popup does NOT need to support the n/N section navigation or the section toggle keybinding — it is a read-only scrollable view.

Key files:
- src/agent_takt/tui/app.py: DetailPopup.compose() — replace Static(format_detail_panel(...)) with Collapsible-based layout mirroring the wide panel structure (app.py lines ~295-303)
- Imports already present: Collapsible, _detail_section_title, _detail_section_body, _detail_summary_lines, _telemetry_badge, DETAIL_SECTION_ORDER
